_comment: Front-end third-party dependency manifest. Versions are pinned HERE (the only thing tracked in git). The notebook server fetches each requested file from `<base><subpath>` (with {version} substituted) on first request, caches it OUTSIDE the repo, and serves it from /assets/vendor/<package>/<subpath> — so the notebook works offline after one warm run. To upgrade, bump a `version`; the new files re-download. See `_vendor_file` in server.jl.
